name: marketingskills
description: Provides marketing capabilities focused on conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to be used by Claude Code and AI agent frameworks.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Raw marketing data or content including SEO keywords, copy drafts, analytics reports, or CRO test results.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration parameters defining campaign goals, target audience, and optimization criteria.

inputs.name: analytics_metrics
inputs.description: Metric data for tracking campaign performance, user engagement, and conversion rates.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Copywriting and SEO-optimized marketing content generated for campaigns.

outputs.name: performance_report
outputs.description: Analytics report summarizing the effectiveness of marketing campaigns and growth metrics.

outputs.name: growth_strategy
outputs.description: Recommended growth engineering tactics and actionable steps for marketing improvement.

steps: Input raw marketing data and campaign parameters
Generate optimized marketing content using SEO and copywriting techniques
Run CRO analysis based on campaign performance data
Produce analytics reports to measure engagement and conversions
Recommend growth engineering strategies based on analytics insights
use_cases: Creating SEO-friendly marketing copy tailored for AI-driven campaigns
Improving website conversion rates through data-backed CRO methodologies
Generating analytics reports to assess marketing impact for stakeholders
Implementing growth engineering tactics via AI agents in digital marketing
Automating the production of marketing content optimized for multiple channels
patterns: SEO keyword optimization for content generation
Automated copywriting based on target audience data
Integration of analytics for continuous campaign improvement

prompt_templates.name: seo_content_generation
prompt_templates.template: Generate SEO optimized marketing copy targeting {target_audience} focused on {product_or_service} with keywords: {keywords}.

prompt_templates.name: cro_optimization_analysis
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the provided campaign data: {campaign_parameters} and suggest CRO strategies to improve conversion rates.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_recommendation
prompt_templates.template: Based on analytics metrics: {analytics_metrics}, recommend actionable growth engineering strategies.
